understood_request: The user wants the total quantity on hand aggregated per location. This requires inventory levels data from erp.inventory_levels (grain: one row per product per location), joined to location details. Existing vault has hub_location and sat_location_details, but no inventory-level satellite or product-location link exists. A new lnk_product_location and sat_inventory_levels must be built, then the mart aggregates qty_on_hand by location.

vault.ddl:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS lnk_product_location (
  product_location_hk VARCHAR(32) PRIMARY KEY,
  product_hk VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
  location_hk VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
  load_dts TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  record_source VARCHAR NOT NULL
)
vault.load_sql:
INSERT INTO lnk_product_location
SELECT DISTINCT
  md5(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(s.product_id AS VARCHAR))) || '|' || UPPER(TRIM(CAST(s.location_id AS VARCHAR)))) AS product_location_hk,
  md5(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(s.product_id AS VARCHAR)))) AS product_hk,
  md5(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(s.location_id AS VARCHAR)))) AS location_hk,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS load_dts,
  'erp.inventory_levels' AS record_source
FROM stg_erp_inventory_levels s
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM lnk_product_location l
  WHERE l.product_location_hk = md5(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(s.product_id AS VARCHAR))) || '|' || UPPER(TRIM(CAST(s.location_id AS VARCHAR))))
)

vault.ddl:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sat_inventory_levels (
  product_location_hk VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
  load_dts TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  load_end_dts TIMESTAMP,
  record_source VARCHAR NOT NULL,
  hashdiff VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
  shelf VARCHAR,
  bin BIGINT,
  qty_on_hand BIGINT
)
vault.load_sql:
INSERT INTO sat_inventory_levels
SELECT DISTINCT
  md5(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(s.product_id AS VARCHAR))) || '|' || UPPER(TRIM(CAST(s.location_id AS VARCHAR)))) AS product_location_hk,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS load_dts,
  NULL AS load_end_dts,
  'erp.inventory_levels' AS record_source,
  md5(
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.shelf AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|'
    || UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.bin AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|'
    || UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.qty_on_hand AS VARCHAR), '')))
  ) AS hashdiff,
  s.shelf,
  s.bin,
  s.qty_on_hand
FROM stg_erp_inventory_levels s
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM sat_inventory_levels sat
  WHERE sat.product_location_hk = md5(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(s.product_id AS VARCHAR))) || '|' || UPPER(TRIM(CAST(s.location_id AS VARCHAR))))
  AND sat.hashdiff = md5(
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.shelf AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|'
    || UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.bin AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|'
    || UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.qty_on_hand AS VARCHAR), '')))
  )
  AND sat.load_end_dts IS NULL
)

mart.ddl:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mart_qty_on_hand_per_location (
  location_bk VARCHAR NOT NULL,
  location_name VARCHAR,
  total_qty_on_hand BIGINT,
  mart_insert_dts TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)
mart.populate_sql: DELETE FROM mart_qty_on_hand_per_location; INSERT INTO mart_qty_on_hand_per_location SELECT hl.location_bk, sld.location_name, SUM(sil.qty_on_hand) AS total_qty_on_hand, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS mart_insert_dts FROM hub_location hl INNER JOIN sat_location_details sld ON hl.location_hk = sld.location_hk AND sld.load_end_dts IS NULL INNER JOIN lnk_product_location lpl ON hl.location_hk = lpl.location_hk INNER JOIN sat_inventory_levels sil ON lpl.product_location_hk = sil.product_location_hk AND sil.load_end_dts IS NULL GROUP BY hl.location_bk, sld.location_name
